patterns.operational_definition: Bijective mapping from natural-language adjective space (Manifold_alpha) to bounded float parameter space (Manifold_beta).
patterns.measurement_proxy: Adjectival L2 Bounding Score: delta(human_intent, shader_output) measured via SSIM/LPIPS perceptual delta. Target: LPIPS < 0.08 per transduction cycle.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: >=3 unique adjectives require explicit numeric bounding; failure triggers FIPI (Failure-Informed Prompt Inversion).
patterns.falsification: Adjective produces multiple non-convergent float values under repeated sampling.

patterns.operational_definition: Detection and remediation of transparent geometry overdraw, where per-fragment evaluation cost scales O(n) per overdraw layer depth.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Overdraw Depth Score (ODS): measured in RenderDoc Overdraw mode. Target ODS < 2.0x average overdraw.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Any translucent shader on mobile triggers mandatory alpha-clip audit. ODS > 4.0 triggers Algorithmic Shame Protocol.
patterns.mitigation: Alpha-test (clip) cutout at 0.5 threshold, or depth pre-pass for sorted transparency.
patterns.falsification: Alpha-clip produces visible texel quantization artifacts that cannot be masked by dithering.

patterns.operational_definition: Reduction of texture sampler slots via RGB/RGBA channel consolidation (ORM packing), treating VRAM bandwidth as a zero-sum thermodynamic budget.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Sampler Reduction Ratio (SRR): n_original_samplers / n_packed_samplers. Target SRR >= 3.0 for PBR materials.
patterns.math_proof: 3 x 1024x1024 BC4 textures = 3 x 512KB = 1536KB. 1 x 1024x1024 BC7 ORM texture = 1024KB. Delta = -512KB VRAM. At scale (100 materials): -51.2MB VRAM.
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Normal maps must remain in BC5 (RG) or BC7; lossy DXT1 on normals is a Category-1 Schema Violation.
patterns.falsification: BC7 ORM introduces cross-channel compression artifacts distinguishable at LPIPS > 0.04 delta vs. source.

patterns.operational_definition: Logarithmic polygon decimation relative to camera distance, enforcing Quadratic Error Metric (QEM) thresholds to preserve silhouette topology.
patterns.measurement_proxy: QEM Error Tolerance Quotient (QETQ): measured as max_error / bounding_sphere_radius. Target QETQ_LOD1 <= 0.02, QETQ_LOD2 <= 0.06, QETQ_LOD3 <= 0.15.
patterns.falsification: Silhouette normals at LOD1 deviate > 15 degrees from LOD0 reference at visible screen percentages.

patterns.operational_definition: Ghosting artifacts in Temporal Anti-Aliasing caused by vertex offset shaders (WPO, vertex animation) failing to output correct per-pixel motion vectors.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Ghost Persistence Index (GPI): frames until ghost resolves after velocity change. Target GPI <= 2 frames at 60fps.
root_causes: Missing 'Output Velocities' flag on WPO materials in UE5
Incorrect previous-frame position calculation in vertex shader
High-velocity displacements exceeding temporal reprojection window
patterns.mitigation: Enable r.MotionBlur.ForceVelocity=1; implement previous-frame world position buffer in vertex shader; clamp WPO amplitude to max 10cm/frame for TAA stability.
patterns.falsification: GPI > 6 frames persists even with correct velocity output, indicating TAA accumulation buffer corruption.

patterns.operational_definition: Tiered approximation of subsurface light transport via sum-of-Gaussians diffusion profiles, degrading gracefully from full separable SSS to cheap wrap-lighting.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Perceptual SSS Fidelity Score: SSIM vs. ground-truth path-traced render. Tier-1 target >= 0.92 SSIM.
patterns.falsification: Tier_3 produces translucent-looking skin on dark geometry that artists cannot distinguish from transparency artifacts.

patterns.operational_definition: Hierarchical LoD pruning of 3DGS primitive sets using distance-dependent opacity decay and octree-based spatial streaming for real-time rasterized pipelines.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Gaussian Reduction Ratio (GRR): rendered_gaussians / total_scene_gaussians at 10m camera distance. Target GRR <= 0.35.
patterns.2026_sota: CLoD-GS (Oct 2025): continuous LoD via learnable distance-dependent decay parameter per Gaussian. FilterGS (Mar 2026): traversal-free parallel filtering achieving fastest preparation time on benchmark datasets.
patterns.mobile_constraint: Mobile-GS (Mar 2026) targets sub-10ms rendering on mobile XR via tile-based architecture with cooperative vector matrix engines.
patterns.falsification: Hierarchical dropout causes visible popping at LOD transitions with dE > 5 CIE76 color difference.

patterns.operational_definition: Catastrophic precision loss in large open-world coordinate systems where shader world-position floats exceed 10,000 units from origin, causing vertex swim and z-fighting.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Precision Error Magnitude (PEM): max visible vertex offset in pixels at 10km from origin. Target PEM <= 0.5 pixels.
patterns.mitigation: Camera-relative rendering (subtract camera position CPU-side before GPU submission); use double-precision origin rebasing; enable Large World Coordinates (LWC) in UE5.3+.
patterns.falsification: LWC shader macros add > 0.5ms per-frame overhead on console targets with > 50 active draw calls.
